type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
In previous years, adapted emission factors based on power output were used. Specifically, emission factors from US EPA AP-42 were adapted based on fuel input emission to power output emission ratios. 
In 2023, the NPRI toolbox calculation tool developed by Environment Canada "Large Stationary Diesel Engines" was used. This tool uses fuel input. This change was made to improve data quality and reporting efficiency/time for staff.
